title: Petelligent 4-Pack Catnip Plush Toys with Silvervine Stick Cat Chew Toys with Various Cute Animal Styles for Indoor Cats
features: Various Cute Animal Styles: This set of catnip toys includes 4 different adorable animal-style plush toys, offering a variety of options for your indoor cats. The toys are designed with exquisite details to capture your cat's attention and curiosity

Stimulating Catnip Infusion: Each toy is infused with natural catnip, a scent that cats find irresistible. Catnip has a stimulating effect on cats, triggering their playfulness and encouraging them to engage with the toys. It provides a source of excitement and entertainment for your indoor cats.

Soft and Durable Materials: These catnip toys are made from soft plush materials, ensuring a comfortable texture for your cats to cuddle and play with. The toys are crafted with high-quality materials, making them durable and safe for extended use.

Enriched Play Experience with Valerian Stick: In addition to the catnip toys, this set also includes a valerian stick. Valerian is a natural plant that appeals to cats and can enhance their play experience. The valerian stick adds an extra element of chewing and chasing fun, keeping your cats engaged and entertained.

Promotes Exercise and Mental Stimulation: The catnip toys and valerian stick help encourage physical activity and mental stimulation for your indoor cats. The toys can be chased, pounced on, and bitten, providing an outlet for your cat's natural instincts. This promotes exercise, helps prevent boredom, and contributes to a healthy lifestyle for your feline companions.
